_comment: Plan G2 — extended ER plasma runs at 100000 steps (= legacy ER_Sim_MT12 length, 1000 ms). Plan G1 (50000 steps) only captured lattice-preservation regime; chains form in second-half of legacy run. ER4_MT08 here is a DIRECT REPLICATION of legacy ER_Sim_MT12 (same params, same length).

campaign.notes: Plan G2 1/3 — MT=0 long control (1000ms total)
Plan G2 2/3 — DIRECT REPLICATION of legacy ER_Sim_MT12 (validation)
Plan G2 3/3 — sonic limit long-time (does melted state recover into chains?)
